ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "form_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial form type */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue reported */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total functional expenses reported */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets at the end of the reporting period */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities at the end of the reporting period */,
  "unrelated_business_income" TEXT /* Indication of presence of unrelated business income */,
  "total_contributions" REAL /* Total contributions received */,
  "program_service_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from program services */,
  "investment_income" REAL /* Income from investments */,
  "compensation_of_officers" REAL /* Compensation of current officers, directors, etc. */,
  "form_990" TEXT /* Link to the submitted Form 990 */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Audit status of the report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "reporting_year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_form_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_type_id") REFERENCES form_types ("form_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_types" (
  "form_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form type */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial form */,
  "filing_requirement" TEXT /* Filing requirement of the form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenues" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the revenue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of asset */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liabilities" (
  "liability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liability entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of liability */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the liability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the liability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensations" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Name of the person compensated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of compensation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compensation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unrelated_business_incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unrelated business income entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unrelated business income */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the income */,
  "business_activity" TEXT /* Business activity generating the income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment income entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of income from the investment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program service revenue entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the program service */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of revenue from the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory requirement entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory requirement */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)
